name: Abyssal Flare (Stage 3)
description: The fully evolved apex of the dark flame sequence. It commands black solar flames that consume dark matter, releasing blinding catastrophic light.
originLore: Forged in the heart of a collapsing supergiant star swallowed by a black hole. Abyssal Flare wields flames so hot they appear pitch black, vaporizing spatial barriers.

lore.celestialConcordance: Abyssal Flare burns away corrupted dark matter in the abyssal layers, consuming entropic debris to fuel multiversal expansion.

quantumResonators.name: Black Hole Nova
quantumResonators.description: Unleashes a dark matter explosion that incinerates physical and immaterial structures.

quantumResonators.name: Void Inferno
quantumResonators.description: Surges with dark flames that drain thermal energy from enemy attacks.
